title: Missing effect dependencies
message: Your cleanup may read the wrong node since the ref `isMountedRef.current` can change before it runs.

title: Missing effect dependencies
message: `useEffect` can run with a stale `prepareChest` & show your users old data.

title: Missing effect dependencies
message: `useCallback` can run with a stale `rollChest` & show your users old data.

title: Missing effect dependencies
message: `useEffect` can run with a stale `SCREEN_HEIGHT` & show your users old data.

title: Missing effect dependencies
message: A spread in `useEffect`'s dependency array hides the actual deps, so stale values can slip through.
suppressionHint: oxlint matches plugin rules only by their full name, so `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` in your eslint-disable comment does not silence `react-doctor/exhaustive-deps` — change it to `react-doctor/exhaustive-deps`.

title: Missing effect dependencies
message: `useEffect` can run with a stale `options` & show your users old data.
suppressionHint: oxlint matches plugin rules only by their full name, so `react-hooks/exhaustive-deps` in your eslint-disable comment does not silence `react-doctor/exhaustive-deps` — change it to `react-doctor/exhaustive-deps`.
